system.description:
The servo-arm's crushing pincers can be used as a deadly melee weapon. The Techmarine may strike with the arm as his Reaction for the round, or as a Standard Attack during his turn (so long as the servo-arm only makes one attack per round).

This weapon uses the servo-arm's Strength of 85 with Unnatural Strength (x2), providing a Strength Bonus of 16 (8 × 2). The arm can extend up to 1.5 metres.

Exceptional Craftsmanship: Provides +10 to Grapple Tests (modifier is on the cybernetic item).

Note: This weapon requires the Astartes Servo-Arm (Exceptional Craftsmanship) cybernetic to be equipped.
